test_cases.name: Add new valid pet
test_cases.description: Verify creation of a pet with all required fields.

test_cases.name: Add pet with missing required fields
test_cases.description: Verify validation error when 'name' or 'photoUrls' is missing.

test_cases.name: Get pet by existing ID
test_cases.description: Verify fetching an existing pet by valid integer ID.

test_cases.name: Get pet with non-existent ID
test_cases.description: Verify 404 response for non-existent resource.

test_cases.name: Get pet with invalid ID format
test_cases.description: Verify 400 response when ID is not an integer.

test_cases.name: Find pets by valid status
test_cases.description: Verify filtering pets by 'available' status.

test_cases.name: Find pets with invalid status string
test_cases.description: Verify 400 error for unsupported status value.

test_cases.name: Upload image for valid pet
test_cases.description: Verify successful image upload with valid binary stream.

test_cases.name: Upload image to non-existent pet
test_cases.description: Verify 404 error when uploading image to missing pet ID.

test_cases.name: Place valid order
test_cases.description: Verify placing a new order with valid JSON body.

test_cases.name: Place order with invalid quantity
test_cases.description: Verify error when providing string instead of integer for quantity.

test_cases.name: Delete order with valid ID
test_cases.description: Verify successful deletion of order < 1000.

test_cases.name: Delete non-existent order
test_cases.description: Verify 404 error when order ID does not exist.

test_cases.name: Create new user successfully
test_cases.description: Verify user registration with complete object.

test_cases.name: User login with valid credentials
test_cases.description: Verify successful login and receipt of session token.

test_cases.name: User login with wrong credentials
test_cases.description: Verify 400 error for incorrect username/password pair.

test_cases.name: Get non-existing user
test_cases.description: Verify 404 when querying a non-existent username.

test_cases.name: Empty username parameter
test_cases.description: Verify handling of empty string as username.

test_cases.name: Update non-existent pet
test_cases.description: Verify 404 when updating a pet that doesn't exist.

test_cases.name: Update pet with malformed JSON
test_cases.description: Verify 400 bad request for invalid JSON payload.
